other.summary: Leanstral is the first open-source code agent designed for Lean 4, a proof assistant capable of expressing complex mathematical objects such as perfectoid spaces and software specifications like properties of Rust fragments. radar.summary_zh: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) 已成為自動駕駛系統的核心，然而，其部署卻因多視角攝影機和多幀視訊輸入所帶來的大量計算開銷而嚴重受阻。現有的 token pruning 方法主要針對單一影像輸入設計，它們獨立處理每個幀或視角，因此未能利用駕駛場景中固有的時空冗餘。為彌補這一差距，我們提出了 ST-Prune，這是一個免訓練、隨插即用的框架...

links.title: Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination

primary_link.title: Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination

top5.summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) show promise on complex tasks but remain prone to coordination failures such as goal drift, error cascades, and misaligned behaviors. We propose Explicit Trait Inference (ETI), a psychologically grounded method for improving coordination. ETI enables agents to infer and track partner characteristics along two established psychological dimensions--warmth (e.g., trust) and competence (e.g., skill)--from interaction histories to guide decisions. We evaluate ETI i
top5.summary_zh: 基於 LLM 的多智能體系統 (MAS) 在複雜任務上展現出前景，但仍容易出現協調失敗，例如目標漂移 (goal drift)、錯誤級聯 (error cascades) 和行為錯位 (misaligned behaviors)。我們提出了顯式特徵推斷 (Explicit Trait Inference, ETI)，一種具有心理學基礎的協調改進方法。ETI 使智能體能夠從互動歷史中推斷並追蹤夥伴在兩個既定心理維度——溫暖（例如，信任）和能力（例如，技能）——上的特徵，以指導決策。我們評估了 ETI i
top5.title: Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination
top5.title_zh: 多智能體協調的顯式特徵推斷

primary_link.title: How Do Answer Tokens Read Reasoning Traces? Self-Reading Patterns in Thinking LLMs for Quantitative Reasoning

top5.summary: Thinking LLMs produce reasoning traces before answering. Prior activation steering work mainly targets on shaping these traces. It remains less understood how answer tokens actually read and integrate the reasoning to produce reliable outcomes. top5.summary_zh: 思考型 LLMs 在回答之前會產生推理軌跡 (reasoning traces)。先前的激活引導 (activation steering) 工作主要旨在塑造這些軌跡。然而，關於答案 tokens 如何實際讀取並整合推理以產生可靠結果，我們仍知之甚少。我們聚焦於定量推理，分析了答案對推理的注意力 (answer-to-reasoning attention)，並觀察到一種與正確性對齊的良性自讀模式 (benign self-reading pattern)，其特徵是閱讀焦點沿著推理軌跡向前漂移，並持續集中

links.title: Involuntary In-Context Learning: Exploiting Few-Shot Pattern Completion to Bypass Safety Alignment in GPT-5.4

primary_link.title: Involuntary In-Context Learning: Exploiting Few-Shot Pattern Completion to Bypass Safety Alignment in GPT-5.4

top5.summary: Safety alignment in large language models relies on behavioral training that can be overridden when sufficiently strong in-context patterns compete with learned refusal behaviors. We introduce Involuntary In-Context Learning (IICL), an attack class that uses abstract operator framing with few-shot examples to force pattern completion that overrides safety training. Through 3479 probes across 10 OpenAI models, we identify the attack's effective components through a seven-experiment ablation study
top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型中的安全對齊 (safety alignment) 依賴於行為訓練 (behavioral training)，當足夠強大的情境模式 (in-context patterns) 與學到的拒絕行為 (refusal behaviors) 競爭時，這種對齊可能會被覆蓋。我們引入了非自願情境學習 (Involuntary In-Context Learning, IICL)，這是一種攻擊類別，它利用抽象運算符框架 (abstract operator framing) 和少樣本範例來強制模式補全，從而覆寫安全訓練。通過對 10 個 OpenAI 模型進行 3479 次探測，我們通過一項七實驗消融研究確定了攻擊的有效組成部分
top5.title: Involuntary In-Context Learning: Exploiting Few-Shot Pattern Completion to Bypass Safety Alignment in GPT-5.4
top5.title_zh: 非自願情境學習：利用少樣本模式補全來繞過 GPT-5.4 的安全對齊

Recent studies suggest that large language models (LLMs) can display human-like prosocial behavior, but the internal computations that produce such behavior remain poorly understood. primary_link.title: UniEP: Unified Expert-Parallel MoE MegaKernel for LLM Training

With the stagnation of Moore's Law and the widening disparity between computation throughput and communication bandwidth, expert parallelism (EP) has emerged as a critical strategy for scaling mixture-of-experts (MoE) models.
